title: Unbound?
description: The official modpack for the Unbound? SMP. This modpack has the goal of providing something for everyone, whether you want to be a farmer, astronomer, mechanic, cult leader, or self-upgrading flesh abbheration!
body:
**The official modpack for the Unbound? SMP!**
A modpack with the goal of providing something fun for every type of player, focusing on the mid-game stages.

Credit goes to all the amazing devs who made all of these incredible mods, and on behalf of the team (me and the voices in my head), we hope you enjoy!

This modpack adds various quality-of-life mods, vanilla-style content mods like Supplementaries and Immersive Weathering, Hexcasting for all your magical needs, and 2 different tech systems!

This modpack is also heavily inspired by the Content SMP, and features many of the mods by the devs who partook in that!

As stated earlier the goal is to appeal to every kind of player, featuring mods that expand upon base minecraft features like enchantments, combat, mining, and redstone, as well as including new and fun things to do like astronomy and space exploration! Trying to improve the exploration dynamics, it revamps horses and encourages investment into large structures like trains by heavily nerfing elytras. It also expounds upon villager and player interactions with the goals of encouraging players to form civilisations and roleplay their hearts out. Valkrien Skies, Hexcasting, Origins, Create, this pack has it all!
